name: imeon-inverter-api

metadata.name: imeon-inverter-api
metadata.summary: A standalone API to collect data from the Imeon Energy Inverters. Uses HTTP POST/GET.

documentation:
# Imeon Inverter Standalone API

[![GitHub Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/-GitHub%20Repository-181717?logo=github)](https://github.com/Imeon-Inverters-for-Home-Assistant/inverter-api)
[![PyPI Package](https://img.shields.io/badge/-PyPI%20Package-%20?style=flat&logo=pypi&logoColor=white&color=%233775A9)](https://pypi.org/project/imeon-inverter-api/)
[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Imeon%20Energy-%2520?style=flat&label=Website&labelColor=grey&color=black)](https://imeon-energy.com/)
[![License: Apache-2.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-Apache_2.0-44cc11.svg)](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)

A standalone API allowing communication with Imeon Energy inverters.

#

### Requirements

- Imeon OS One v1.8.1.0+ (release end of 2024).

### Features
- uses HTTP POST/GET (auth + read-only)
- compatible with all models
- request rate limiter


### Planned
- changing inverter settings from API calls

## Installation

You can install the package using pip:

```bash
pip install imeon_inverter_api
```
You can then simply use the package like this:
```python
import imeon_inverter_api
```


## Wiki

For documentation and some examples, please consult this project's **[wiki](https://github.com/Imeon-Inverters-for-Home-Assistant/inverter-api/wiki)**.

modules.name: imeon_inverter_api
documentation: A standalone API allowing communication with Imeon Energy inverters.

classes.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.login
documentation: Request client login. See Client documentation for more details.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.update
documentation: Request a data update from the Client. Replaces older data, but doesn't affect "one-time" data.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.init
documentation: Request a data initialisation from the Client. Collects "one-time" data.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.get_address
documentation: Returns client IP.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_inverter_mode
documentation: Change the inverter mode to the given input.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_mppt
documentation: Change the maximum power point tracking range to the given input.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_injection_power
documentation: Change the injection power limit to the given input.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_lcd_time
documentation: Change the LCD screen sleep time to the given input.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_date
documentation: Change the inverter date to the given input.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_feed_in
documentation: Activate/deactivate grid power injection.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_night_discharge
documentation: Activate/deactivate nightly discharge for the battery.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_grid_charge
documentation: Activate/deactivate grid charge for the battery.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_relay
documentation: Activate/deactivate the relay.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.inverter.Inverter.set_ac_output
documentation: Activate/deactivate AC output.

Client data organised as a class storing the collected data, 
with methods allowing periodical updates. Meant for use in
supervision tools (such as Home Assistant).

    Note: for manual access, here's the storage structure
        ```
        self._storage = {
                "battery" : {},
                "grid": {},
                "pv": {},
                "input": {},
                "output": {},
                "meter": {},
                "temp": {},
                "monitoring": {},
                "manager": {},
                "inverter": {},
                "timeline": [{}],
                "smartload": {}
            }
        ```

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client._bottleneck
documentation: Place a timer in queue to slow down requests.
HELPER METHODS #

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.task
documentation: Bottleneck the amount of requests sent out, in speed and volume.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.build_request
documentation: Decorate async requests with automatic timeout and error handling.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.login
documentation: Connect to IMEON API using POST HTTP protocol.
IMEON API CALLS #

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_instant
documentation:
Gather instant data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

    Note: this gathers a large amount of instant data at once,
          it is advised to only use this when you need all
          the collected data quickly.
POST REQUESTS #

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_onetime
documentation: Gather one-time data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_timeline
documentation: Gather timeline data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_timed
documentation:
Gather minute data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

    Note: this call is quite slow even without rate limiting, use
          get_data_instant() if you're interested in collecting
          a lot of data at once.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_monitoring
documentation:
Gather monitoring data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

    Note: this is mostly meant to be used for a supervision screen,
          so using time intervals longer than hours is recommended
          for more sensible data collection.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_manager
documentation: Gather relay and state data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.get_data_smartload
documentation: Gather relay and state data from IMEON API using GET HTTP protocol.

methods.name: imeon_inverter_api.client.Client.set_from_dict
documentation:
Send data changes to IMEON API using HTTP POST.

"inputs" can contains the following fields:
    inverter_mode   : <str> (smg | bup | ong | ofg) 
    mppt            : [<int>, <int>]
    feed_in         : <bool>
    injection_power : <int>
    lcd_time        : <int>
    date            : <str> (yyyy/mm/ddhh:mm)
    night_discharge : <bool>
    grid_charge     : <bool>
    relay_active    : <bool>
    ac_output_active: <bool>
POST REQUESTS #

Client to connect to securely connect to the inverter and request 
data through POST/GET requests.
